title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 57.050 - Approval of bond
text:
57.050.  Approval of bond. — Such bond may be taken by the clerk of the circuit court, in vacation; and, if so taken, shall be approved or disapproved by the circuit court at the next term.
(RSMo 1939 § 13129) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 11509; 1919 § 11633; 1909 § 11204
